name: try-monitor
description: HTTP host monitor in system tray

scripts.build: vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && copy /Y electron\preload.cjs dist-electron\preload.cjs
scripts.start: vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && copy /Y electron\preload.cjs dist-electron\preload.cjs && electron .
scripts.package: node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && copy /Y electron\preload.cjs dist-electron\preload.cjs && electron-builder

author: Try Monitor Team
